message:
refactor(providers): rename Gemini API identifier to google-generative-ai

Change the GeminiProvider::api() return value from "gemini" to
"google-generative-ai" to match the official Google Generative AI API
naming convention. Updates both the implementation and the corresponding
provider_factory test assertion.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
